name: fine-tunes registry entry includes a training_data identifier referencing the source dataset
command: mkdir -p prompts && printf 'fine_tunes:\n  - {artifact_id: ft-1, base_model: sonnet, training_data: ds-internal-2026-05, license: MIT}\n' > prompts/fine-tunes.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-fine-tunes.sh" --registry prompts/fine-tunes.yaml --check training-data 2>out.txt && grep -q 'training_data=ds-internal-2026-05' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
